title: Trident craft tweak
description: Trident Craft mod enhances Minecraft by allowing players to craft  tridents .
body: Trident Crafting   *** **Description:** Ever wanted to craft a Trident instead of hunting drowned mobs for one? Now you can! With this custom data pack, you'll be able to craft the powerful and elusive Trident right from your crafting table. Designed to balance gameplay while still providing an alternative way to obtain this iconic weapon, the recipe is fair but challenging, making it a worthy addition to any survival world. *** **Crafting Recipe:** * **3x iron swords** * **2x diamonds** * **2x sticks** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_0ddfa523-a9e2-4dae-8d13-173514e96ebe.png)   *** **Installation:** 1. Download the data pack. 2. Place the trident\_craft`.zip` file into the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world. 3. Run the `/reload` command or restart your world. 4. Enjoy crafting your own Tridents!
